author: codex-agent

patch.value: Scope: add manage-only runtime probe flag, normalize warning parity surfaces, and expose explicit runtime probe metadata while preserving default manage/explore runtime status compatibility.
Add opt-in runtime probe mode for extension manage parity
Introduce an opt-in runtime probe for pm extension --manage so users can request doctor-like runtime activation semantics without changing default compatibility behavior.

pm extension --manage supports an opt-in runtime probe that computes runtime_active/activation_status with doctor-equivalent semantics; default manage behavior remains compatibility-safe; warning surfaces are normalized for automation.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm context --limit 20; pm list-open --limit 200; pm list-in-progress --limit 200; pm search 'extension diagnostics warning parity runtime probe' --limit 20; pm search 'activation_status unknown manage doctor' --limit 20. Net-new scope because no active canonical item tracks opt-in runtime probe mode for manage.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Design target keep default manage output stable and gate runtime activation inspection behind explicit opt-in flag.

message: Create runtime probe parity issue | explicit_unset=dependencies,learnings

value.text: Completed opt-in runtime probe mode for extension manage parity with doctor-like runtime_active/activation_status semantics when explicitly requested. Default manage behavior remains compatibility-safe. Verification: extension command + CLI integration tests, full coverage, and typecheck passed.
